creator: craig@yekse.gank.org
text:
It's difficult to see what the changes are -- this should be submitted
as a diff against the current port.  Also, the shar is corrupt (lines
are split); if this is a web-submitted PR then the form is broken,
otherwise please check your mail client configuration.

I don't see anything addressing the SSE problem that I ran into with the
soundtouch library when I first started working on the 1.2.6 port, so
this probably won't compile on i386.  Will post a diff when I have that
issue resolved.
